hero.title: Meet Aipify – Your Digital Coworker
hero.subtitle: Aipify helps your business stay organized, respond faster, and work smarter — inside the systems your team already uses.
hero.simpleExplanation: Aipify is a digital coworker that helps your business stay organized, respond faster, and work smarter.
hero.notChatbot: Not a chatbot. A calm digital coworker with human control built in.

animatedDemo.title: How Aipify works in practice
animatedDemo.subtitle: From support request to resolution — visual, auditable, human-controlled.

1.title: Support request arrives
1.detail: A customer inquiry enters from email, chat, or your admin.

2.title: Intent identified
2.detail: Aipify classifies category, urgency, and routing.

3.title: Knowledge Center search
3.detail: Approved knowledge sources are searched — metadata only.

4.title: Response drafted
4.detail: A business-ready draft is prepared for review.

5.title: Human approval
5.detail: Your team approves, edits, or delegates future handling.

6.title: Response sent
6.detail: Approved work is executed inside your workflow.

7.title: Audit log created
7.detail: Every step is recorded with explainability.

8.title: Dashboard updated
8.detail: Operations view reflects the outcome in real time.

9.title: Workflow learned
9.detail: Approved patterns improve future recommendations — reversibly.

animatedDemo.mobileSummary: Request → intent → knowledge → draft → approval → send → audit → dashboard → learn

enterpriseTrust.title: Built for trust. Designed for control.
enterpriseTrust.subtitle: Aipify assists employees and organizations without monitoring screens, keystrokes, private files, or browsing history. It follows organizational permissions, governance policies, and approval rules.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant architecture
multiTenant.description: Every customer scoped by tenant — no cross-tenant data in customer surfaces.

rbac.title: Role-based permissions
rbac.description: Owner, admin, support, staff, and read-only mapped to your native roles.

audit.title: Audit logging
audit.description: Actions, approvals, and configuration changes logged with explainability.

humanOversight.title: Human oversight
humanOversight.description: Aipify recommends. Humans decide. Critical actions never run without people.

delegatedTrust.title: Delegated trust controls
delegatedTrust.description: Gradually delegate approved workflows — explicit, reversible, auditable.

noSurveillance.title: No employee surveillance

earlyAccess.title: Request early access
earlyAccess.subtitle: Tell us about your organization and primary interest area.
earlyAccess.name: Full name
earlyAccess.success: Thank you — we will be in touch shortly.
earlyAccess.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email support@aipify.ai.
earlyAccess.privacy: We store only the information you provide to respond to your request. Aipify does not sell lead data.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions about early access, enterprise, or partnerships.
contact.note: For Control Center access, use your existing account or request early access.

ownership.title: You own your data
ownership.body: Customer operational data belongs to the customer. Aipify owns the intelligence layer — metadata, patterns, and approved learning summaries only.

noSurveillance.title: No employee surveillance
noSurveillance.body: Aipify does not monitor employees, keystrokes, screens, private files, or browsing history. Presence indicators reflect system state — not individual surveillance.

collection.title: What we collect
collection.body: Account information, installation metadata, configuration, and anonymised operational metrics. We do not store raw email content, chat transcripts, or payment records in learning memory.

license.title: Software license
license.body: Aipify is proprietary software owned by Aipify Group AS. Customers receive a license to use the service — not ownership of the software.

use.title: Acceptable use
use.body: Use Aipify in compliance with applicable law and your organization's policies. Do not attempt to bypass tenant isolation or approval controls.

knowledgePage.title: Knowledge Center
knowledgePage.subtitle: Common questions about Aipify.
knowledgePage.faqIntro: Transparent answers about the product, trust, and enterprise readiness.

1.a: Aipify is a digital coworker that helps your business stay organized, respond faster, and work smarter. Formally, it is an Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) for support, knowledge, follow-up, operations, deliverables, trust, and clarity.

2.a: No. Aipify is a digital coworker — an Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) for support, knowledge, follow-up, operations, deliverables, trust, and clarity. Chat is one surface; the product is operational assistance with human control.

3.a: No. Aipify augments people. It prepares drafts, organizes knowledge, and handles repeatable work within approved boundaries. Your team makes important decisions.

4.a: Aipify helps your business stay organized, respond faster, and work smarter — through support, knowledge, follow-up, operations, deliverables, trust controls, and explainable clarity.

5.a: No. Aipify is not employee surveillance software. It should not monitor screens, keystrokes, private files, or browsing history.

6.a: Yes. Aipify can generate reports, summaries, certificates, spreadsheets, presentations, and other business deliverables.

7.q: Can Aipify be used by larger companies?
7.a: Yes. Aipify is designed with multi-tenant architecture, roles, permissions, audit logs, SSO readiness, and enterprise deployment readiness.

8.q: How does Aipify become more useful over time?
8.a: Organizations can gradually delegate approved workflows to Aipify through explicit, reversible, and auditable trust policies.
